_comment_api_key: Copy this file to arc_config.json and paste the plaintext key from arc-issue-key.mjs. arc_config.json is gitignored. NEVER share, screenshot, or zip-with-share this file once populated — it holds a live API credential.
_comment_text_encoder_patterns: Optional. Case-insensitive substrings appended to the locked 'textencode' catch-all when redaction runs. Use this to ADD patterns for bespoke encoder class_types whose names don't contain 'TextEncode' (e.g. T5Encoder, PromptInput). You cannot REMOVE the catch-all — new/unknown encoder variants stay fail-closed by default. Delete this whole field if you don't need extras.
